title: DebateMessage
description: A single message exchanged between agents, routed through the Father agent.

sender.description: The agent that produced this message.

recipient.description: The intended next recipient. All routing goes through the Father.

turn.description: 1-based turn index within the debate transcript.

content.description: The argument text or routing instruction.

sources.description: URLs or citation strings sourced from the Web Search tool.

token_count.description: Total tokens consumed producing this message (prompt + completion).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the message was produced.
